The error is in option D. The statement that "during communication, if the connection is lost, the data will be temporarily saved, allowing transmission to continue once reconnected" is incorrect. According to the provided text, if the cable becomes disconnected during data transfer, data can become corrupted and may require a RESET of the receiving unit. There is no mention of data being temporarily saved and transmission continuing after reconnection. The text states that data can become corrupted if the connection is lost, not that it is temporarily saved for continuation.
